un.caen.config

Class Config

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.config.Config

  • public class Config
extends java.lang.Object
    The Config class contains constant configuration values for the game. These constants define various parameters such as grid dimensions, player settings, energy values, and weapon specifications.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int CELL_SIZE
      The size of each cell in the grid (in pixels).
      static int DEFAULT_ENERGY
      The default amount of energy for each player at the start of the game.
      static int DEFAULT_ENERGYKIT_VALUE
      The default value of an energy kit when collected.
      static int DEFAULT_GUN_AMMO
      The default amount of ammo for guns.
      static int DEFAULT_MINE_COUNTDOWN
      The default countdown time for mines (in seconds).
      static int DEFAULT_WEAPONS_SIZE
      The default number of weapons that each player starts with.
      static int GRID_HEIGHT
      The height of the game grid.
      static int GRID_WIDTH
      The width of the game grid.
      static int MAX_WALL
      The maximum number of walls that can be placed on the grid.
      static int NUMBER_OF_PLAYERS
      The number of players in the game.
      static int TOTAL_ENERGY_KIT
      The total number of energy kits available in the game.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Config()
